case_title: RUSSELL DAVIS VS. AMERIPRISE AUTO $ HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO $ HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO $ HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-06-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO $ HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF RUSSELL DAVIS AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE STEVEN FONG, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. EVERETT TAYLOR, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. THE COURT RETAINED BOTH PLAINTIFF'S & DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO $ HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
